title: MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page » MAGAZINE
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page to show the connected MAGAZINE
So I can ...
description:
* The MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected MAGAZINE.
* The MAGAZINE is presented with its name and primary information.
* The MAGAZINE contains a link to its detail page.
* The MAGAZINE has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no MAGAZINE connected to the MAGAZINE ISSUE then the section is not displayed at all.
